jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Cars24
jsonLd.description:
Cars24 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cars24:
Cars24 is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24!
